title: Career Agency, Success Criteria, and Search Constraints · Career Decision Retrieval
summary: A delayed hiring review reconstructs career agency, success criteria, and search constraints from target, claim, evidence, audience, action, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, consent, owner, and next-decision evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for learner-owned career decision charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define a personally meaningful career outcome with observable success, guardrails, tradeoffs, and a review date.
Separate hard constraints, flexible preferences, assumptions, unknowns, and resources without disclosing private reasons unnecessarily.
Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Success Definition · changed case · Review Success Definition
steps.instruction:
review case — A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Which action demonstrates Success Definition without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Success Definition · changed case · Review Success Definition.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define a personally meaningful career outcome with observable success, guardrails, tradeoffs, and a review date. For Success Definition · changed case · Review Success Definition, keep Success Definition connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Success Definition condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub Resume and Project Presentation Tutorial — Controls selective project presentation, useful repository descriptions, setup, demonstration, tests, dependency currency, and truthful links from application evidence.

hints: For Success Definition · changed case · Review Success Definition, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Success Definition precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Success Definition · changed case · Review Success Definition, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Success Definition · changed case · Review Success Definition, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: A successful search has one universal outcome: the highest available salary.

options.text: Define a personally meaningful career outcome with observable success, guardrails, tradeoffs, and a review date. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for learner-owned career decision charter.
A successful search has one universal outcome: the highest available salary. That claim fails the success definition · changed case evidence boundary for Success Definition.

For success definition · changed case, apply Success Definition without its stated preconditions, omit the learner-owned career decision charter trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Success Definition for learner-owned career decision charter.
